Loops/Eval booking
LIVE · agentic

Proof viewed → eval scheduled.

Relay-style human-in-the-loop: the eval booking agent drafts the 15-minute screen-share invite — scenario URL, W1 film, booking link — founder sends one tap from hello@sourcea.app. No personal Gmail. Every pack logged every run.

Three steps logged

  1. Proof viewed — prospect opens public scenario + boot-proof.json
  2. Eval pack — agent writes subject, body, public URLs (never localhost)
  3. Founder send — Mail draft from official SourceA sender only

What buyers see

Live proof from today — not a mockup. Link to Governance Gauntlet and W1 film on your published SourceA surface. Honest BLOCK on boot if factory is not fresh — that is the wedge.

Runs today in factory

Pipeline rows AB1 and NW1 in proof_viewed → eval_scheduled. Metrics surface in the command center Pipeline tab from factory-live.json.

See it in command center

Pipeline tab shows real eval_scheduled count.

Home console →
